include_curves.description: Include full DVH curve arrays (doses_gy, volumes_cc, volumes_pct). Default false for compact agent responses.

max_points.description: When include_curves is true, downsample each curve to at most this many points. Useful for reducing token usage — 100-200 points is typically sufficient for visualization. Default: no limit (full 0.01 Gy resolution).

precision.description: Round curve array values to this many decimal places. Reduces JSON size (e.g. precision=2 yields '12.35' instead of '12.345600000000001'). Default: full f64 precision.
